programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Musician Jon Batiste joins Ina Garten for a conversation about staying strong and making Grammy history; Ina makes peanut butter and jelly bars for a taste of nostalgia and Jon shares his Ma's Louisiana-style red beans and rice.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Designer Daniel Roseberry spends the day with Ina Garten, sharing fashion secrets and flower arrangements, after Ina bakes a Tri-Berry Ricotta Cake for breakfast; then, Ina teaches Daniel how to make smashed burgers with caramelized onions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into dishes with and without meat; in Mobile, AL, there's rabbit, while in Omaha, NE, a vegan joint brings a meatless spin to fried chicken; in Stamford, CT, Guy and sportscaster Dan Patrick chow down on Greek.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri grabs fistfuls of flavor at a California spot bringing next-level Mediterranean to the West Coast; a New Jersey bistro by the beach slings herbaceous octopus, and an Indianapolis Argentine joint fires up chimichurri chorizo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing creative flavor combos that pack a punch; a NYC couple is bringing Greek grub to Naples, FL; a Dallas spot is serving over-the-top pork belly lollipops; a Triple-G winner is putting out next-level ramen in Chicago.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's rolling out with a little holy moly in New Hampshire, where a joint is puttin' out bomb bagels; in North Carolina, a funky spot is adding a Southern spin to egg rolls; a fun Florida chef is goin' prime time with pastrami and pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri digs Greek-style lasagna at a family-run diner in Columbus; a California joint adds flair to comfort food with top-notch chicken and dumplings; big deal BBQ in New Jersey serves up pork and brisket piled high.

programme.sub-title: Pups and Cats Save HumCatDingerMan; Pups Save a Turbot Tournament

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Talkative Mini Patrol; Pups Save the History of Adventure Bay
programme.desc: Alex dreams that his Mini Patrol animals can talk; the animals take the Bookmobile on a wild ride; Mayor Humdinger steals the ancient book.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save the Risky Race; Rescue Wheels: Pups Save the Runaway Truck
programme.desc: When Boomer challenges Roxi in a race to the top of a mountain, his reckless driving causes an avalanche of boulders.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Ghost; Pups Save a Show
programme.desc: When a ghost appears at the Lookout, the Pups and Chase have a stakeout; the Pups put on a Medieval play in the town square.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Mountain Climbers; Ultimate Rescue: Pup Save Captain Gordy
programme.desc: Rubble leads the pups in building an emergency landing pad for Captain Gordy; Mayor Goodway, Danny and the Turbots are stuck in a canyon in the mountains.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save Adventure Bay
programme.desc: Two competitive truckers come to town for a monster truck rally, one of them befriends the pups, the other stirs up lots of trouble.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Circus; Pup a Doodle Do
programme.desc: A baby elephant gets loose when the circus comes to town; the PAW Patrol must search for Mayor Goodway's lost chicken.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: A storm causes Skye to crash-land in the snow; Mayor Humdinger plans to cheat; the Pups must save a stunt pilot and her plane; Smiley the frog jumps into Skye's helicopter; Walinda gets tangled in an anchor chain; Mayor Goodway's backpack slips.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Trophy; Pups Save the Wind Trekkers
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger's mom loses her son's phony trophy, the PAW Patrol have to rescue her and its secret stash of treats; when Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta get trapped inside a mesa, it's up to the PAW Patrol and a little snake to rescue them.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Rescue Knights Break the Ice; Pups Save Excalibark
programme.desc: Claw finds a way to make Sparks' breath icy; Chase accidentally pulls the legendary Golden Bone of Excalibark from its stone.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: The Cat That Roared; Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Saving the Safe
programme.desc: Leo and Rory join the PAW Patrol on a visit to the jungle; they end up rescuing a baby monkey; when Mayor Humdinger rebuilds Meow Meow to break into Mayor Goodway's new safe, the Cat Pack joins the PAW Patrol to save the day.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save Helga and the Humsquatch; Pups Save the Missing Bone-Stone
programme.desc: While Humdinger gets dressed for a day with his Hummy Mummy, the Humsquatch accidentally puts on the mayor's suit and takes his place; when a precious bone goes missing, the Pups' only chance at getting it back is to team up with Sweetie.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Rescue Knights: Pups Save a Tournament; Rescue Knights: Pups Save the Baby Dragons
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol helps a Mystery Knight and the Princess in disguise win a tournament when Claw and Sparks show up to sabotage the event; the Rescue Knights must save some baby dragons from Claw and reunite them with their mommy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Search and Rescue: Pups Save a Snack-Snatcher
programme.desc: When the Adventure Bay potluck food goes missing, the Search and Rescue pups deputize the whole community to track it down.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Tooth Fairy; Pups Solve the Mystery of the Missing Art
programme.desc: Julius loses his tooth and has a dream that the PAW Patrol saves a bumbling tooth fairy; when all the paintings mysteriously disappear from the Art Museum Festival, the PAW Patrol must solve the missing art mystery and return all the paintings.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Bay; Pups Save a Goodway
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol clean up an oil spill in the water near Adventure Bay; the PAW Patrol must help Mayor Goodway get a statue from the bottom of the bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Get Skunked; Pups and a Whale of a Tale
programme.desc: When Everest gets sprayed by a skunk, the pups tell her delicately that she needs a bath; the pups fly north to help free a baby whale that is trapped under the ice.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Mighty Pups Stop a Mighty Eel; Pups Save a Floating Royal Carriage
programme.desc: When an eel accidentally swallows a piece of the meteor and becomes gigantic, it's up to the Mighty Pups to save Adventure Bay; after Sweetie decides to commandeer the Princess's royal carriage and horses, Sid the pirate sends Arrby to steal it.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.sub-title: A Slow Day in Zippy City!
programme.desc: Everything is fast in Zippy City, but when Tiny the Slug and the Opposites Crew slow everything down to the opposite of fast with sticky slime, detectives Zooli and Goby have to stop them before it's too late.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When supervillain Dr. Coldfinger takes Curly Q's newest invention, the Ultra Spy Tool, secret agents Molly, Goby and Spy Pup must travel across the world to find and infiltrate his North Pole lair.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Bubble Guppies learn how to care for pets when Gil wants to adopt a puppy.

programme.sub-title: The Boy With the Dragon Skateboard
programme.desc: When the TroubleMakers break Logan's skateboard, the team must find all the pieces and help him put his skateboard back together.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi
programme.desc: Milli, Geo and Bot travel through the city to bring a sled to their friend.

programme.title: PAW Patrol

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups' Adventures in Babysitting; Pups Save the Fireworks

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Friend; Pups Save a Stowaway
